overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player character entering a bar called 'Night City Pub' from a neon-lit street, walking through the main seating area with red chairs and a long counter, then proceeding into a back office with neon signage including 'CYBERBABES', and finally into a storage room with industrial shelving and equipment.

events.description: entering the bar from the street through the front door

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar entrance from the street and stepping inside

entered.detail: green neon sign with OPEN text mounted on the door
concrete exterior wall with large window and metal trim
red decorative string lights visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The sequence begins outside at night, approaching a building entrance marked by a bright green neon OPEN sign. Red decorative lights are visible through the window to the right as the camera moves toward and enters the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar area with seating and counter

events.description: turning toward the back room after passing the length of the bar counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the main bar area, observing the red plastic chairs and the long wooden counter

entered.detail: long wooden bar counter with a light-colored top surface
red plastic chairs arranged around small tables against the wall
red and yellow bar stools lined up along the counter
large circular warm white lights hanging from the ceiling
purple neon sign reading NIGHT CITY PUB with a beer mug icon
dark glass beer bottles sitting on the counter surface
wall-mounted shelves holding bottles behind the bar

segments.scene_description: Inside the main bar area, the camera moves past red plastic chairs on the left and a long wooden counter on the right with colorful stools. Warm pendant lights hang from the ceiling, and a purple neon sign reading NIGHT CITY PUB is visible behind the bar. Beer bottles sit on the counter as the camera progresses deeper into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: back office with neon signage and windows

events.description: moving from the public bar area into the back office space with windows
approaching the bright pink CYBERBABES neon sign illuminating the corner

agents.ego_description: moving through the back room, examining the neon signs and desk area near the windows

entered.detail: windows with horizontal blinds showing red exterior lights outside
pink neon sign of a flamingo mounted high on the wall
metal desk with equipment and cardboard boxes on top
vertical purple neon sign reading CYBERBABES with a female silhouette
cardboard boxes stacked on the desk surface

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a back office area, the space features windows with blinds on the left showing red lights from outside. A pink neon flamingo sign and a metal desk with boxes occupy the right side. The camera approaches a bright vertical neon sign reading CYBERBABES with a silhouette, illuminating the corner with purple light.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with industrial shelving and equipment

events.description: entering the deeper storage area with metal shelving units and industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: examining the storage shelves and industrial equipment in the dimly lit back room

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with various stored items and boxes
red hydraulic jack or lift equipment near the wall
shelves holding mechanical parts and industrial tools
tall metal storage cabinets against the back wall
windows showing the dark night exterior with distant red lighting

segments.scene_description: The final area is a narrow storage room with metal shelving units on the left holding various items. A red hydraulic jack stands in the center while industrial equipment and metal cabinets line the right wall. Windows at the far end show the dark exterior, and the lighting becomes significantly dimmer in this utilitarian space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit street into the increasingly dim and utilitarian depths of a city pub. It begins outside at night, approaching a doorway marked by a bright green neon open sign and red decorative lights before crossing the threshold. As the camera enters the main bar, the environment opens into a warm space filled with red plastic chairs, a long wooden counter, and a purple neon sign reading Night City Pub. The scene then shifts into a back office, where the lighting turns pink and purple around a metal desk and a glowing Cyberbabes sign, before turning toward a final doorway. The movement concludes by entering a narrow, dimly lit storage room characterized by industrial metal shelving, a red hydraulic jack, and dark windows overlooking the exterior.
